UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOODS, KIERAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLMES, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1320 ARMSTRONG AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCSICO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77200667)

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, DAVID
